data.title: Société Générale S.A. holds 3,208,942 shares of Jyske Bank A/S, equivalent to 5.22% of total share capital.
data.description: Jyske Bank has announced in compliance with Section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act that Société Générale S.A. of Paris, France, specifically at 29 Boulevard Haussmann, currently holds 3,208,942 shares of a nominal value of DKK 10 in Jyske Bank A/S. This ownership, which was acquired indirectly through shares and similar financial instruments, accounts for approximately 5.22% of the total share capital of Jyske Bank.
ECB's Nagel: German government was right launching large fiscal package.

data.title: Crypto stocks plummet as Bitcoin dips under $90K amidst Trump's trade war turmoil, with Strategy and SharpLink Gaming hit hard.
data.description: The stocks of Strategy and SharpLink Gaming, which focus on cryptocurrency, saw a significant decline as Bitcoin dropped below $90,000. This downturn occurred in response to new tariff threats from former US President Trump.

data.title: Long Home is the official roofing company of Boston Red Sox, linking with shared values like trust, tradition.
data.description: In a significant development, Long Home, a family-owned home improvement company catering to homeowners throughout New England, revealed on January 20, 2026 a fresh collaboration with a historic brand. This alliance brings together renowned New England brands that prioritize trust, craftsmanship, and enduring community dedication. The partnership emphasizes shared values and strengthens their commitment to serving their local communities.

data.title: Sproutr LLC earns 2026 Great Place To Work Certification™ with 100% employee satisfaction, 12-point increase.
data.description: In Solebury, Pennsylvania, on January 20, 2026, Sproutr announced with pride that it has been certified by Great Place To Work. This esteemed recognition is solely based on feedback from current employees regarding their work experience at Sproutr. The survey results revealed that this year, an impressive 100% of employees rated Sproutr as a great place to work, which is a noteworthy increase of 12 points from the previous rating.

data.title: Healthcare advocates question Florida officials on cuts to AIDS Drug Assistance Program, limiting access for thousands with HIV; changes start March 1, 2026.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida, healthcare advocates are set to rally at the state capitol in protest of significant cuts to the state's AIDS Drug Assistance Program (ADAP) by the Florida Department of Health (FDOH). The announced cuts will result in the removal of access to crucial medication and healthcare services for thousands of individuals living with HIV/AIDS in Florida. Effective March 1, 2026, Florida ADAP will lower the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) income eligibility threshold for uninsured clients, impacting the livelihoods of many individuals in need of assistance.

data.title: Remote automates thousands of customer migrations with LangChain AI agents, using LangGraph to build a Code Execution Agent.
data.description: A Code Execution Agent was developed by the global HR platform Remote by utilizing LangChain and LangGraph technologies. This innovation aims to convert manual data migrations into automated processes, streamlining operations and increasing efficiency.
Aspo Plc buys back its shares on 20.1.2026.

data.title: PenFed Foundation and FFVC partner in Raleigh to support veteran entrepreneurs; program equips early-stage businesses.
data.description: Partnering with First Flight Venture Center (FFVC), the Raleigh program of the Foundation aims to support veteran entrepreneurs in the early stages of their ventures. This initiative, based in Raleigh, North Carolina, was announced on January 20, 2026, and intends to provide essential resources to enable aspiring entrepreneurs to realize their business concepts. Through this collaboration, facilitated by the PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes, veterans will gain access to the tools and support necessary for successful business development.

data.title: Rokt partners with Cineplex to use AI in ecommerce checkout, adding non-endemic offers, boosting revenue.
data.description: Cineplex has announced plans to incorporate non-endemic offers into its checkout process, enhancing customer benefits and creating additional revenue sources. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to diversify its services and increase profitability. This partnership, set to commence on January 20, 2026, with Rokt, a prominent ecommerce technology firm leveraging machine learning and AI for optimized transactions. The integration aims to streamline the customer experience while exploring new avenues for financial growth.

data.title: Secretary Bessent advises Powell against attending Supreme Court argument on Fed's independence after he himself attended a tariff case.
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent criticized Jerome Powell for attending hearings on Fed independence, commenting that it was a misstep. Interestingly, Bessent himself participated in a tariff case.

data.title: Certified Laboratories becomes Amazon-approved TIC for supplements, solidifying their position in regulated product testing.
data.description: Certified Laboratories, a company within the Certified Group based in Burbank, California, has further established its position as a leader in regulated product testing. On January 20, 2026, they announced their official recognition as an Amazon-approved Testing, Inspection, and Certification (TIC) organization for dietary products. This expansion solidifies their expertise in this sector and highlights their commitment to meeting industry standards. This recognition aligns with their goal of ensuring quality and safety, showcasing their dedication to excellence in the field.
